allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD='17392812412ze' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d thinkingcoding -c "SELECT vector_dims\(vector\) AS dims, count\(*\) FROM graph_embeddings GROUP BY 1;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='17392812412ze' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d thinkingcoding -c "SELECT format_type\(a.atttypid, a.atttypmod\) AS col_type FROM pg_attribute a WHERE a.attrelid = 'graph_embeddings'::regclass AND a.attname = 'vector';")
Bash(PGPASSWORD='17392812412ze' psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d thinkingcoding -c "SELECT indexname, indexdef FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename = 'graph_embeddings';")
